Ballistics Tools

Ballistics Toolkit is a comprehensive suite of precision shooting tools that brings ballistic calculations to your browser. Built with modern web technologies and WebAssembly, it provides accurate trajectory calculations and realistic target simulation without requiring any software installation.

Available Tools

📊 Ballistic Calculator

3DOF trajectory calculator with G1/G7 drag models, atmospheric compensation, and wind effects.

Open Calculator

🎯 Target Simulator

Monte Carlo match simulation with NRA targets, statistical analysis, and realistic variability modeling.

Open Simulator

🌬️ Wind Simulator (Beta)

Real-time wind visualization with realistic atmospheric patterns, turbulence modeling, and spectral synthesis. This feature is in active development and may change.

Open Wind Simulator

🎯 F-Class Shooting Game

Interactive shooting game with WebGL 2 rendering, realistic wind flags, and physics-based ballistics. Use arrow keys to aim and spacebar to fire!

Play Game
